name: Baboli Pizza Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the first six ingredients and let rise for 30 minutes.
2. Divide the dough into three parts and place in three olive-oiled pie pans.
3. Dimple the dough with your fingers.
4. Mix olive oil and water, then brush the tops of the dough with this mixture.
5. Sprinkle the top of each pizza with sea salt, ground pepper, chopped rosemary and thyme, and 1/2 cup of water.
6. Let rise for an additional 50 to 60 minutes.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes.
8. Optionally, dip in olive oil. If using dried herbs, soak them in water for 10 minutes before patting dry with paper towels.
